description: A ceremonial journey of sacred chants, hypnotic rhythms, and earthy, transcendent soundscapes, music for ritual, reflection, and deep inner travel.

This masterpice album was crafted in collaboration with sound therapists, its harmonious blend of carefully arranged rhythms, harmonies, and bass lines help to slow the listener's heart rate, reduce blood pressure, and lower levels of the stress hormone cortisol.
This tracklist sits in a psychedelic, ritualistic space, mixing psychedelic rock, art rock, cosmic instrumentals, and mystical atmospheres.

Intergalactic Flow invites you to trust the universe’s rhythm, letting perceptions align with the highest good. Surrendering to life’s flow, we embrace each moment with faith, knowing it guides our evolution.
An eclectic blend of psychedelic downtempo and world ambient—organic textures, hypnotic basslines, and magical, immersive grooves.
This curation ignites transformation, urging us to envision ourselves beyond the present and embrace a higher, more evolved self.
Electronic music unlocks new dimensions of awareness, soundtracking this generation’s dance to freedom.
A cosmic blend of harps, Persian classical, spiritual house, and electronic music, igniting the imagination.
A soothing blend of delta and theta waves at 432 Hz, perfect for sleep, relaxation, and sound therapy.
A journey of introspection, evoking the serene energy of a sacred temple and the soothing warmth of tea notes that awaken the mind.
This selection blends spiritual downtempo, psychedelic soul, ambient jazz, and cosmic textures, balancing groove and transcendence.
Each note takes us closer to the eternal, each harmony a bridge to the unseen. In music's embrace, we transcend the ordinary, touching the infinite with every beat.

Minimalist, introspective, and immersive, featuring lush, dreamlike, cinematic soundscapes.

This lighthearted and eclectic compilation invites listeners to embark on a joyful journey across a vibrant ocean of sound.

A selection by bnjmngrdn engineered for inner work, altered states, and the space between worlds. Drift into dream logic, where time softens and reality loses its edges. These recordings support non-ordinary states of consciousness and expanded sensory awareness.
